---
title: "ePortfolio"
description: "An ePortfolio showcasing my own personal skills, achievements and past work."
author: "Robert Mullins"
date: 2026-04-24
image: "/images/portfolio.jpg"
categories: [Quarto, SCSS, Python, Data Analytics]
---

## Overview

::: {.callout-note}
This project was completed as part of BAA1028 Workflow & Data Management at DCU. The reflection for this project can be viewed [here.](/reflection.qmd)
:::

## View GitHub Repository here

[{{< fa file-pdf >}} GitHub Repo](https://github.com/robert-mullins/robertmullins.github.io){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}

---
